videos.title: Learn CSS Transform In 15 Minutes
videos.description: Complete coverage of all 2D transform functions: rotate, scale, translate, skew, and combining multiple transforms effectively.

videos.title: A new way to do CSS transforms!
videos.description: Introduction to individual transform properties (rotate, scale, translate) as alternatives to the traditional transform property.

videos.title: #30 CSS Transform Property - CSS Full Tutorial
videos.description: Comprehensive guide to all CSS 2D transform functions with clear examples and transform-origin explained.

videos.title: Really fun CSS hover effects
videos.description: Practical application of 2D transforms and transform-origin in creating engaging hover effects and animations.
